nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=85 beats='Milo and Gran arrive at the beach on a bright low-tide morning, Gran in her big beach hat carrying the picnic basket and Milo swinging his red bucket; the sea has gone way out and left the rocks shiny and dotted with tide pools; Gran says the water always comes back, like a friend coming home; Milo cannot wait to explore; warm, sunny, and excited, never worried'>>

choices.label: Follow Gran down the sandy path.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Gran leads the way down the sandy path and spreads her towel on the big flat rock where she can see everything; she reminds Milo of the beach rules, stay on the dry rocks, wet feet are fine, and call if you ever want a hand; Milo promises with a salute and turns toward the shining pools'>>

choices.label: Step out onto the flat low-tide rocks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='out on the rocks Milo hears tiny voices; the low tide has left some tide-pool friends stranded too high and dry, a sea star on a bare ledge, a splashy little fish in a shrinking puddle, a crab wrapped up in seaweed, and a tiny periwinkle far from any pool; far off the sea sparkles, already turning around to come home; Milo decides to help everyone before it arrives, starting with the sea star'>>

choices.label: Hurry to the sea star on the high ledge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Milo reaches the tall rock where Stella the sea star sits on a bare dry ledge above his head; her five arms droop like a tired star sticker; she calls down that the ledge is getting warm and she would very much like to be back in the cool water below'>>

choices.label: Climb the low steps for a closer look.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Milo climbs two safe flat steps and says hello; Stella perks up one arm to wave; the ledge is dry as toast and her deep cool pool waits just below; Stella says any rescue plan is fine with her, she is a very patient star; Milo looks at his red bucket, at his own two hands, and at the little slope'>>

choices.label: Think up a rescue plan for Stella.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Milo lines up his ideas while Stella waves cheerfully from her dry ledge; he could toss water up to her with cupped hands, carry the full bucket up the little slope to pour her a waterfall, or wet his hands and slide her gently down to the pool himself; Gran watches from her flat rock, ready with a tip whenever he wants one; must read the same on a first visit and on any try-again visit'>>

choices.label: Toss water up with your cupped hands.
Carry the full bucket up the little slope.
Wet your hands and gently slide Stella down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo scoops sea water in his cupped hands and tosses it up toward the ledge, but the water rains straight back down on his own head, plip plop; Stella giggles so hard her arms wiggle; Milo laughs and shakes his wet hair like a puppy; no harm done, just a soggy fringe; he can line the plans up again or trot over and ask Gran for a tip'>>

choices.label: Line up the plans and try again.
Ask Gran for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo fills the bucket and starts up the little slope, but the bucket wobbles, tips, and whooshes every drop over his own shoes; his toes squelch; Stella claps two arms for the amazing splash; Milo grins and wiggles his soggy toes; nothing lost, the sea has plenty more water; he can go back to his plans or ask Gran for a tip'>>

choices.label: Shake off the splash and try again.
Ask Gran for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=65 beats='Gran tips back her beach hat and smiles; sea stars like slow and gentle, she says, wet your hands first so Stella can hold on comfy, then slide her down to her pool like a little slide ride; Milo can try the gentle sliding idea right away or look over his plans once more; reads the same on any visit'>>

choices.label: Try Gran's gentle sliding idea.
Look over the plans once more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Milo dips his hands in the pool until they are cool and wet, reaches up, and Stella holds on with all five arms; slow and gentle, he slides her down the rock and into the deep cool pool with a soft ploop; Stella stretches every arm wide, like a happy dance underwater'>>

choices.label: Watch Stella settle into her pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=60 beats='Stella presses one arm up against the glassy top of the water like a high five and burbles thank you; just then a flappy splashing sound comes from a puddle across the rocks; someone else needs help; Milo can hurry toward the sound, or sit with Gran and let the returning tide finish the rescuing'>>

choices.label: Hurry toward the flappy splashing sound.
Sit with Gran and let the tide finish the rescuing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Milo hops carefully from flat rock to flat rock toward the splashing; out past the pools the friendly sea has crept one sparkly step closer, glittering as it comes; Gran waves her hat from her rock; the splashing gets louder in a puddle no bigger than a dinner plate'>>

choices.label: Kneel beside the shrinking puddle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='in the little puddle a small silver fish zips in busy circles; the puddle is only as deep as a soup bowl and the warm sun is sipping it smaller; the fish pops his mouth up and says his name is Flick and he would very much like a bigger pool please; hopeful and chatty, never scared'>>

choices.label: Lean in and say hello to the little fish.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Milo tells Flick that help is here; a big deep pool waits just two hops away, calm and shady; Flick zooms an excited lap around his puddle; Milo looks from his two quick hands to the strip of sand between the puddles to his trusty red bucket, three ways this rescue might go'>>

choices.label: Think up a plan to move Flick.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Milo studies the puddle while Flick swims hopeful loops; he could try to catch Flick with his bare hands, dig a little river through the sand so the puddle can flow to the big pool, or dip the bucket and scoop water and fish up together; Flick blows a bubble that seems to say you can do it; must read the same on a first visit and on any try-again visit'>>

choices.label: Catch Flick with your bare hands.
Dig a little river over to the big pool.
Scoop water and fish up together in the bucket.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo cups his hands and reaches in, but Flick is quicker than a sneeze; he zips between Milo's fingers, tickles his thumb, and splashes a tiny wave right up Milo's nose; Milo snorts with laughter and Flick does a proud little flip; no harm done to anyone; Milo can pick a plan again or ask Gran for a tip'>>

choices.label: Line up the plans and try again.
Ask Gran for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo drags his finger through the sand to dig a little river, but the thirsty sand drinks the water down with a polite glug before it travels anywhere; the channel just sits there, damp and empty; Milo pats the sand and giggles at his disappearing river; Flick shrugs his fins; Milo can pick a plan again or ask Gran for a tip'>>

choices.label: Smooth the sand and try again.
Ask Gran for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=65 beats='Gran leans forward on her rock and smiles; fish do not like to be squeezed, she says, but they do love to swim; scoop up water and Flick together in the bucket and he can ride to the big pool swimming the whole way; Milo can try the gentle scoop or look over his plans once more; reads the same on any visit'>>

choices.label: Scoop water and fish up together, Gran's way.
Look over the plans once more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Milo lowers the bucket slowly into the puddle and Flick swims right in, riding his very own cupful of sea; two careful hops later Milo tips the bucket at the edge of the big pool and Flick pours out with the water, zooming one giant loop around his cool new home'>>

choices.label: Watch Flick zoom around his big new pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Flick leaps one sparkling thank-you hop and races another lap; from over by the seaweed patch comes a busy clack-clack-clack, like tiny castanets; someone else is stuck; Milo waves goodbye to Flick and turns toward the sound'>>

choices.label: Follow the clack-clack sound to the seaweed.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Milo crosses the rocks toward the clacking; behind him the friendly sea has slid another sparkly step up the sand, filling the farthest pools first like little cups; the seaweed patch ahead is green and shiny, and something in the middle of it is waving'>>

choices.label: Cross the rocks to the seaweed patch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='in the seaweed patch a small crab is wrapped up in slippery green ribbons like a present that tied itself; he clacks his claws hello and says his name is Pinch; he was climbing through when the seaweed flopped over, and now his legs are in a friendly muddle; cheerful, not frightened'>>

choices.label: Crouch down beside the tangled crab.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Milo crouches close and Pinch wiggles to show which legs are stuck; the seaweed is shiny and slippery as wet noodles; Pinch promises his claws only pinch things that poke too fast; Milo looks at the tangle, then at the picnic spoon peeking out of his pocket, and starts to think'>>

choices.label: Think up a plan to untangle Pinch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Milo considers the seaweed muddle while Pinch waits, waving one free claw like a tiny flag; Milo could give the seaweed one quick tug to pull it away, hold out the picnic spoon for Pinch to grab like a handle, or untangle one seaweed ribbon at a time, slow and careful; Gran hums a beach tune from her rock nearby; must read the same on a first visit and on any try-again visit'>>

choices.label: Give the seaweed one quick tug.
Hold out the picnic spoon for Pinch to grab.
Untangle one seaweed ribbon at a time.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo grips the slippery seaweed and gives one quick tug; the wet ribbon slides straight through his fingers and Milo sits down plop in a shallow warm puddle; Pinch waves both claws as if to say whoa, nice splash; Milo laughs and stands up dripping and completely fine; the tangle is still tangled; he can pick a plan again or ask Gran for a tip'>>

choices.label: Stand up and try again.
Ask Gran for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo holds out the picnic spoon and Pinch grabs it, but instead of climbing free the crab pinches on tight and waves the spoon around like a shiny trophy; Milo has a gentle giggly tug-of-war just to get his spoon back and tucks it safely in his pocket; the tangle is still tangled; he can pick a plan again or ask Gran for a tip'>>

choices.label: Pocket the spoon and try again.
Ask Gran for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=65 beats='Gran calls over softly from her rock; tangles hate hurrying, she says, hum a slow song and loosen one seaweed ribbon at a time, and the whole knot will give up all by itself; Milo can try the slow ribbon-by-ribbon way or look over his plans once more; reads the same on any visit'>>

choices.label: Untangle one ribbon at a time, Gran's way.
Look over the plans once more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Milo hums a slow beach song and loosens one green ribbon, then another, then another; the tangle gives up with a soft slurp and Pinch steps out, stretching each leg one by one like a tiny gym class; the cool pool beside the seaweed is deep and ready for him'>>

choices.label: Watch Pinch scuttle into the cool pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=60 beats='Pinch clacks a happy drumroll on a pebble and scuttles a thank-you circle around his pool; high on the dry rock above, something tiny gleams, a periwinkle shell a long way from any water; Milo can head up to help, or watch from Gran's towel while the rising tide fetches the little periwinkle itself'>>

choices.label: Head for the tiny shell far up the rock.
Watch from Gran's towel while the tide fetches the periwinkle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Milo tiptoes up the dry rock, keeping his feet on the rough gray parts the way Gran likes; the sea is closer now, filling pool after pool behind him with happy gurgles; near the top, a shell no bigger than a button sits all alone in the sunshine'>>

choices.label: Tiptoe up the dry rock to the tiny shell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='near the top of the dry rock sits a periwinkle shell no bigger than a button, far from any water; a tiny voice inside gives a tiny polite cough; the sun is warm, the rock is very dry, and the shell is a very long walk from home for someone so small'>>

choices.label: Bend down and greet the little periwinkle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Milo bends down and the tiny shell peeks out; her name is Winnie, and she went exploring at low tide and wandered much too far; her cool pool is way down the rock, and periwinkles are the slowest walkers on the whole beach; Milo dips one hand in a nearby pool while he thinks'>>

choices.label: Think up a plan to bring Winnie home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Milo thinks it over while Winnie waits, snug in her shell; he could roll Winnie along the rock like a tiny wheel, cheer her on and let her walk there herself, or wet his palm and offer her a slow careful ride down to her pool; Winnie says any way is fine, she is in no hurry at all, though the sea rather is; must read the same on a first visit and on any try-again visit'>>

choices.label: Roll Winnie along like a tiny wheel.
Cheer for Winnie to walk faster.
Offer Winnie a ride on your wet palm.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo gives Winnie the gentlest nudge to start her rolling like a tiny wheel, but Winnie tucks herself snugly into her shell and simply will not budge, stuck fast as a pebble glued to the rock; no rolling today, thank you, says a tiny muffled voice; Milo laughs at his silly fizzled idea, and Winnie peeks back out, completely comfy; he can pick a plan again or ask Gran for a tip'>>

choices.label: Smile at the stubborn shell and try again.
Ask Gran for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo claps and cheers, go Winnie go; Winnie tries her very fastest, and after one whole minute of mighty effort she has traveled the width of a single pebble; she puffs proudly; at this speed they might arrive by next Tuesday; Milo cheers once more anyway, because trying deserves a cheer; he can pick a plan again or ask Gran for a tip'>>

choices.label: Line up the plans and try again.
Ask Gran for a tip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=65 beats='Gran cups her hands around her mouth and calls up gently; little snails ride better than they roll, she says, wet your palm so it feels like home, let Winnie hold on tight, and walk her down slow as a Sunday; Milo can offer the wet-palm ride or look over his plans once more; reads the same on any visit'>>

choices.label: Offer Winnie a wet-palm ride, Gran's way.
Look over the plans once more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Milo wets his palm in a pool and lays his hand flat beside Winnie; she slides aboard and holds on snug; this is the longest, highest, most careful rescue of the whole day, step by slow step down the big rock while the arriving tide gurgles behind him like a cheering crowd, until he kneels at the edge of her cool pool'>>

choices.label: Lower Winnie into her cool pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Winnie settles onto her favorite green stone with a tiny happy squeak, home at last; just then a bright gurgle runs all along the rocks; the sea is arriving, filling the pools like a friend opening every door on the street; Milo lifts his head'>>

choices.label: Look up at the sparkling line of the sea.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Milo stands tall on the flat rocks; every friend is safe, Stella stretched out in her pool, Flick zooming in the deep one, Pinch drumming by the seaweed, Winnie snug on her green stone; the sea sweeps closer in sparkly stripes, warm and friendly, coming to welcome everyone home; Gran gives Milo a proud thumbs up from her rock'>>

choices.label: Watch the first wave-finger slide in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the first thin finger of tide slides across the rocks and fills the nearest pool right up to its brim; the water is home and the whole rescue is complete; the pools fizz and sparkle like a celebration; Milo can follow the tide from pool to pool to see each friend greet it, climb up beside Gran on the flat rock to watch it all at once, or open the picnic basket to celebrate the rescue team'>>

choices.label: Follow the tide from pool to pool.
Climb up beside Gran on the flat rock.
Open the picnic basket to celebrate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo trots beside the friendly tide as it fills pool after pool like a row of tea cups; Stella's pool is next and already trembling at the brim; Milo can stay and cheer as Stella's pool spills over, race the soft foam line up the dry sand just for fun, or peek around for anyone else who might still need a hand'>>

choices.label: Cheer as Stella's pool spills over.
Race the foam line up the dry sand.
Peek around for anyone else who needs help.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Milo lines up his toes on the dry sand, well ahead of the water, and waits for the soft foam line to catch up; Gran calls ready, steady, go from her rock; the tide whooshes gently forward and Milo takes off giggling along the dry sand beside it'>>

choices.label: Run the last few splashy-sounding steps.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='Milo shades his eyes and looks over the busy, filling pools; nobody calls for help, but under a shadowy ledge something small is bobbing on the new water, and along the wet sand a glittery trail winds toward a heap of shining pebbles; both look like tiny mysteries worth one last look before the picnic'>>

choices.label: Peek under the shadowy ledge.
Follow the glittery trail.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Milo climbs up beside Gran on the big flat rock and she wraps him in the warm corner of her towel; below them the tide fills every pool one by one while the friends wave, splash, and clack; Gran asks how the rescue team would like to celebrate; they could sing a welcome-home song, shout three hip-hip-hoorays, or call each friend by name as their pool fills'>>

choices.label: Sing the welcome-home song.
Shout three hip-hip-hoorays.
Call each friend's name as their pool fills.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Gran opens the picnic basket on the flat rock, crackers, berries, and two little cups of juice; below them the tide sparkles into the last pools while the friends splash hello to it; Milo can raise juice cups in a toast to the rescue team, tell Gran the whole story of the rescue day, or start planning the next low-tide rescue patrol'>>

choices.label: Raise juice cups to the rescue team.
Tell Gran the whole rescue story.
Plan the next low-tide rescue patrol.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=80 beats='Milo snuggles next to Gran on the towel and shares crackers while the friendly tide slides in; the water reaches the little fish and his puddle grows into a lake, unwraps the crab from his seaweed, and carries the tiny periwinkle gently home, doing the rest of the rescuing all by itself; Milo waves to each friend as they float free and happy; one rescue by Milo and three by the sea, says Gran, what a fine team; Milo snuggles deeper into the warm towel, proud of Stella's rescue and already excited to come back and visit the brimming pools'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=80 beats='from Gran's towel Milo watches the sparkly tide climb the rock, higher and higher, until it reaches the tiny periwinkle shell and lifts her like a leaf on a stream; the little snail sails down to her pool in style, and a tiny faraway wheee floats across the rocks; three rescues by Milo and one by the sea, says Gran, sounds like a fine team; Milo waves until the little shell settles safely into deep cool water'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='the tide tips over the rim of Stella's pool and the water rises around her like a big cool hug; Stella does a slow magnificent underwater cartwheel of thank you, all five arms sparkling; Milo cheers, Gran cheers from her rock, and the sea keeps rolling gently in, welcoming every rescued friend home; best low tide ever, Milo decides, and Stella cartwheels once more as if she completely agrees'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='Milo and the foam line race up the beach and Milo wins by exactly one giggling toe; the tide pit-pats little wave-claps behind him and fills the last pools while Gran shouts hooray; Milo takes a big bow to the sea, and the sea seems to bow back with one soft sparkly wave; every friend is home, the water is back where it belongs, and Milo is the fastest rescuer on the whole beach'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='under the shadowy ledge bobs a hermit crab in a curly borrowed shell, already floating home on the new water and needing no rescue at all; he tips his shell to Milo exactly the way Gran tips her beach hat; Milo tips an invisible hat right back; a new friend to wave to as the friendly tide carries him past the rocks, while all the rescued friends settle happily into their brimming pools'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='the glittery trail winds between two pebbles and stops at a perfect empty shell, striped like a peppermint and polished smooth by the sea; Gran says it is a thank-you gift from the beach for a hard-working rescuer; Milo holds it to his ear and hears the tide inside, whooshing home; he carries it back in the red bucket, a treasure to remember the rescue day forever'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='Milo and Gran make up a welcome-home song right there on the flat rock, with a splash for Stella, a zoom for Flick, a clack for Pinch, and one slow lovely note for Winnie; the friends join in from their brimming pools, splashing along in time, and the tide keeps the beat with soft whooshes; the song floats out over the water until every pool is full and everybody is home'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='hip hip hooray, hip hip hooray, hip hip hooray; Milo and Gran shout three big cheers as the sea rolls home across the rocks, and the friends answer with splashes, bubbles, and claw-clacks from their pools; the tide fills the very last pool with a happy gulp; every friend is safe, every pool is brimming, and the whole beach feels like it is clapping along'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='as each pool fills, Milo calls its friend by name; welcome home, Stella; welcome home, Flick; welcome home, Pinch; welcome home, Winnie; each friend pops up and waves an arm or a fin or a claw or a tiny shell, then settles snug into deep cool water; Gran squeezes Milo's shoulder; every single friend is home, and Milo is the reason why'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='Milo and Gran clink their little juice cups together on the flat rock; to the rescue team, says Gran, to brave Stella, zippy Flick, ticklish Pinch, and unhurried Winnie, and to the helper who never gave up; below them the tide sparkles into every pool while the friends splash a fizzy toast of their own; Milo sips his juice and decides that rescue days taste especially sweet'>>

ending.title: A Toast to the Rescue Team

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='Milo tells Gran the whole story of the rescue day, the high dry ledge, the shrinking puddle, the seaweed muddle, and the long slow ride home for the littlest shell; Gran listens under her beach hat and declares it the best beach story she has ever heard; below them the full pools sparkle and the friends splash, as if adding their own favorite parts to the tale'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='Milo and Gran plan the next low-tide rescue patrol with cracker-crumb maps on the towel; Gran will bring her hat and the basket, Milo will bring the red bucket and his gentle wet hands; below them the tide tucks every friend into deep cool water for the afternoon; the sea will go out again someday, Gran says, and when it does, the rescue patrol will be ready'>>
